items.name: tokens
items.title: Admin UI tokens
items.description: Semantic color, typography and radius tokens. Required by every other item.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn() — Tailwind class merger
items.description: Standard shadcn `cn()` helper combining clsx and tailwind-merge.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile()
items.description: Standard shadcn responsive hook. Required by the sidebar primitive.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (override)
items.description: shadcn AlertDialog over Radix Dialog. Confirmation pattern used by AdminConfirmDialog.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: shadcn Avatar over Radix Avatar.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: shadcn Badge with cva-driven variants. Intent-colored badges layer the `border-success` / `bg-warning-muted` utilities from tokens.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: shadcn Breadcrumb used by the SiteHeader.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: shadcn Button with the admin variants and sizes (xs, sm, default, lg, icon-xs, icon-sm, icon-lg).

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: shadcn Card. Avoid nested cards (see contract section 2).

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: shadcn Checkbox over Radix. Supports `indeterminate` state used by bulk-action tables.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: shadcn DropdownMenu over Radix. Used by row action menus and the Plans & Billing `+ New` menu.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: shadcn Input with admin form styling.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: shadcn Label over Radix. Required by every form field via AdminFormField.

items.name: native-select
items.title: Native select
items.description: Custom NativeSelect: native <select> with shadcn-style classes. We deliberately avoid Radix Select to keep keyboard, screen reader and mobile behavior native.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: shadcn Pagination used by AdminPaginationFooter.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: shadcn Separator over Radix.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: shadcn Sheet over Radix Dialog. Foundation for AdminDetailSheet and AdminRegisterSheet.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar (shadcn primitive)
items.description: Full shadcn Sidebar primitive set. Wrapped by AppSidebar in app-shell.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: shadcn Skeleton used by AdminTableSkeleton and AdminCardSkeleton.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: shadcn Table. Wrap in AdminTableSurface for the standard bordered container.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: shadcn Tabs over Radix. Used by pages with 2-4 sibling resources and by AdminDetailSheet.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: shadcn Textarea with admin form styling.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: shadcn Tooltip over Radix. Used by AdminTimestamp, AdminTruncatedText and any truncated cell.

items.name: admin-command-palette
items.title: Admin command palette
items.description: ⌘K palette for cross-module navigation and quick actions. Radix Dialog based.

items.name: admin-confirm-dialog
items.title: Admin confirm dialog
items.description: Destructive/confirmation dialog wrapping AlertDialog with loading + intent.

items.name: admin-detail-sheet
items.title: Admin detail sheet
items.description: Right-side detail sheet with optional tabbed sections. Read view for a record.

items.name: admin-feed-item
items.title: Admin feed item
items.description: Timeline/activity feed row with icon, title, meta and timestamp.

items.name: admin-field-card
items.title: Admin field card
items.description: Labeled key/value card used inside detail sheets and field grids.

items.name: admin-filter-toolbar
items.title: Admin filter toolbar
items.description: Search + filter toolbar with a responsive filter sheet on mobile.

items.name: admin-form-field
items.title: Admin form field
items.description: Label + control + description/error wrapper. Foundation for every form.

items.name: admin-metric-card
items.title: Admin metric card
items.description: KPI card with display-font value, label, delta and optional sparkline slot.

items.name: admin-page-header
items.title: Admin page header
items.description: Page title, description and primary/secondary actions row.

items.name: admin-page-layout
items.title: Admin page layout
items.description: Standard page scaffold: header slot + scrollable body with consistent spacing.

items.name: admin-pagination-footer
items.title: Admin pagination footer
items.description: Range label + page controls + page-size selector for tables.

items.name: admin-register-sheet
items.title: Admin register sheet
items.description: Right-side create/edit sheet with footer actions and loading. Pairs with forms.

items.name: admin-skeletons
items.title: Admin skeletons
items.description: AdminTableSkeleton + AdminCardSkeleton for the mandatory loading state.

items.name: admin-sortable-head
items.title: Admin sortable head
items.description: Sortable <TableHead> button bound to useAdminSort state.

items.name: admin-sparkline
items.title: Admin sparkline
items.description: Dependency-free inline SVG sparkline for metric cards.

items.name: admin-state
items.title: Admin state
items.description: Empty / error / no-results states with icon, copy and optional CTA.

items.name: admin-status-badge
items.title: Admin status badge
items.description: Intent-colored status badge mapping domain status -> token color.

items.name: admin-surfaces
items.title: Admin surfaces
items.description: AdminPanel, AdminTableSurface and metric grid — the standard bordered containers.

items.name: admin-timestamp
items.title: Admin timestamp
items.description: Relative timestamp with absolute value on hover via Tooltip. Mono font.

items.name: admin-toggle-group
items.title: Admin toggle group
items.description: Segmented single-select control for view/scope switching.

items.name: admin-truncated-text
items.title: Admin truncated text
items.description: Truncates text and reveals the full value on hover via Tooltip.

items.name: admin-api
items.title: admin-api (createResourceApi)
items.description: fetch wrapper: adminApiRequest, AdminApiError and createResourceApi(list/get/create/update/remove) for a REST resource. Adapt the base URL to your backend.

items.name: admin-keyboard
items.title: admin-keyboard (rowActivationHandler)
items.description: rowActivationHandler: Enter/Space keydown handler that activates a row without hijacking Tab/Escape.

items.name: admin-toast
items.title: admin-toast helpers
items.description: toastSuccess / toastError / toastMutation built on sonner, with the standard operational tone.

items.name: app-scope
items.title: app-scope
items.description: AppScope type, storage key and default options for the SiteHeader app selector.

items.name: use-admin-filters
items.title: useAdminFilters()
items.description: URL/state-synced filter values with debounced search and reset.

items.name: use-admin-selection
items.title: useAdminSelection()
items.description: Row selection state for bulk actions: toggle, select-all, indeterminate, clear.

items.name: use-admin-pagination
items.title: useAdminPagination()
items.description: Page index + page size state with range computation for AdminPaginationFooter.

items.name: use-admin-sort
items.title: useAdminSort()
items.description: Sort column + direction state consumed by AdminSortableHead.

items.name: app-sidebar
items.title: App sidebar
items.description: Parameterized application sidebar: brand, nav groups, permission filtering, primary action and NavUser footer. Wraps the shadcn sidebar primitive.

items.name: site-header
items.title: Site header
items.description: Top bar with sidebar trigger, breadcrumb and app-scope selector.

items.name: nav-user
items.title: Nav user
items.description: Sidebar footer user menu with avatar, account link and logout.
